skills.name: Reading Time Calculator
skills.description:
Estimates the reading time for a piece of text based on word count.
Uses configurable words-per-minute rate. Also provides word count,
sentence count, and paragraph count statistics.

test_cases.description: Calculate reading time for short text

input.text: Hello world. This is a test.

test_cases.description: Calculate reading time for a longer article

input.text: Artificial intelligence is transforming the world. Companies across every industry are investing heavily in AI research and development. From healthcare to finance, the applications seem limitless. Machine learning models are becoming more sophisticated each year. Natural language processing has reached human-level performance on many benchmarks. Computer vision systems can now identify objects with remarkable accuracy. The next decade will likely see even more dramatic advances. Researchers are working on artificial general intelligence. The implications for society are profound and far-reaching. We must ensure these technologies are developed responsibly.

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Language Detector
skills.description:
Detects the language of input text and returns the language name,
ISO 639-1 code, and a confidence score. Supports 50+ languages
including mixed-language text detection.

input.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Bonjour le monde, comment allez-vous aujourd'hui?
Guten Morgen, wie geht es Ihnen heute? Das Wetter ist sehr gut.

skills.author: ai-skills-team

skills.name: Markdown to HTML Converter
skills.description:
Converts Markdown text to HTML. Supports headers, bold, italic,
links, images, code blocks, blockquotes, unordered lists,
ordered lists, and horizontal rules.

input.markdown:
# Title

This is **bold** and *italic* text.

- Item 1
- Item 2

> A blockquote

skills.author: ai-skills-team
